status: prospectively frozen positional robustness run after inspecting the failed archived checkpoint graph; same cohort and endpoint, not an independent replication
scientific_question: Does signed-relation topology appear at the natural end of a complete scientific question with no answer scaffold or checkpoint marker?

position.name: question_end
position.definition: final chat-template prompt token after the complete scientific stem

analysis.strong_rule: both exact p <= 0.05, AUC > 0.5, and at least 4/6 family AUCs > 0.5
analysis.jacobian_specific_rule: positive paired family-level 95% interval for Jacobian minus direct

guardrails: same inspected cohort and endpoint; not independent replication
all prompts, layers, families, fits, behaviors, and negative results retained
positive topology is observational and within supplied mechanism families
no literal chain-of-thought, consciousness, complete ontology, or causal-use claim
